pi_items.source: Found exactly matching ORK file path string in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
Found exactly matching report file path string in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
Confirmed this is the exact source file used in setup_task.sh to instantiate the workspace rocket.
Verified the pass criteria threshold in verifier.py explicitly requires a score >= 60.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 'simple_model_rocket.ork', a real example rocket design created by Sampo Niskanen (the original OpenRocket developer) and distributed with the OpenRocket software. The expected modified ORK path (/home/ga/Documents/rockets/cluster_conversion.ork), the target text report path (/home/ga/Documents/exports/cluster_report.txt), the base ORK file name, and the passing score threshold of 60 are all explicitly defined and correctly checked by the task's setup, export, and verifier scripts.
